SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-05-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-05-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF HOWARD JUNKER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROCKY SOTO IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JUNKER, HOWARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOTO, ROCKY $1,729.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,779.00, DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO A 25% REDUCTION IN RENT (CIVIL CODE 1942.4 (B)(1) DUE TO PROVEN HABITABILITY ISSUES AT THE PREMISES FROM JANUARY THRU APRIL 2017. DEFENDANT IS ALSO ENTITLED TO $2000.00 IN RENT REDUCTION FOR HARASSMENT RELATING TO PLAINTIFF'S REPEATED VIOLATIONS OF CIVIL CODE SECTION 1954. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
